title: lagochilopsis subhispidus
intro: Lagochilopsis subhispidus is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae and is native to the southwestern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lagochilopsis subhispidus include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
